name.value: Prescription Glasses for Every Occasion and Lifestyle

value.value: Prescription Glasses for Every Occasion and Lifestyle

name.value: Not all glasses are pressed from the same mold. Those plastic round frames that are comfier than an old pair of sweats? Not so great for basketball. But they definitely fit the bill for sitting at the computer. At 39dollarglasses.com you’ll find new pairs of frames and lenses tailor-made for every situation you can imagine. From playing video games to office work, reducing migraines, and even driving, we’ve got the prescription eyewear you need to make the most of life.

name.value: Worried you’ll have a change of heart after you get your hands on your new frames or lenses? Rest easy, because 39DollarGlasses offers a home trial program so you can test out frames for 5 days before committing. We also offer worry-free refunds (less shipping) for 30 days after the date of delivery, as well as a 90-day grace period during which you can return your frames or lenses for a free exchange or store credit and WE’LL pay the shipping!
